allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl, pptx, docx, yaml; print\('all ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -m pip install --user --quiet openpyxl python-pptx python-docx pyyaml)
Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl, pptx, docx, yaml; print\('openpyxl', openpyxl.__version__\); print\('pptx', pptx.__version__\); print\('docx ok'\); print\('yaml ok'\)")
